description: Style NoteThis force 10 sandal is a comfortable footwear that performs well when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies! Product DetailsRound toed floaters in black and grey with fabric forefoot and ankle loop straps mounted in syntheticVelcro closure on the straps for a customised FitSoft rubber footbedTough rubber footbed with multidirectional grooves and lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabric, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
